projects.title: Salesforce Multi-Touch Attribution and Revenue Reporting
projects.summary: Designed and implemented a weighted Salesforce attribution system connecting recent email, event, sales and organisational engagement with enquiries, referrals, opportunities, placements and revenue reporting.
projects.details: Use one case study for the three-week Campaign engagement window, Lead/Contact/Account attribution paths, domain and MAT context, returning-customer and sequence-sensitive weighting, the Attribution Model custom object, dashboards and revenue reports. Campaign influence, dashboarding, purchase-influence analysis and complex-journey reporting are outputs of this same implementation, not separate projects.

projects.title: Local-Authority Account Hierarchy, Contract Pricing and Commercial Risk
projects.summary: Designed a local-authority-centred Salesforce account model linking organisations, people, contracts, pricing and commercial exposure.
projects.details: Keep the parent-account hierarchy, CMDT-driven assignment, validation rules, local-authority context across Accounts, Leads and Contacts, Contract-object pricing and Opportunity automation in one page. Contract segmentation and commercial-risk prioritisation are applications of the same architecture.
projects.featuredMetric: Applied across 1,000+ Accounts and 20,000+ Leads and Contacts, representing approximately 240 local authorities.

projects.title: MAT and Private Governing-Organisation Commercial Architecture
projects.summary: Modelled schools within their Multi-Academy Trust, independent-school-group and wider governing-organisation relationships, then operationalised those relationships across Salesforce and MCAE.
projects.details: Combine buying-committee mapping, relationship-led sales, identity resolution, ABM, stakeholder mapping and CRM intelligence as parts of one concrete architecture. The page should cover parent relationships, custom lookup keys, a dynamic Screen Flow, CMDT domain matching, purchase-triggered Campaigns, MCAE validation, grading, nurture and sales routing.
projects.featuredMetric: Mapped approximately 50% of school Accounts to 215 MATs and private governing organisations.

projects.title: Salesforce Lead Opportunity Forecasting and Automated Closure
projects.summary: Built a pre-conversion Lead opportunity process that guided sales activity, calculated forecast value, preserved repeated attempts and closed inactive work automatically.
projects.details: Use one page for the Screen Flow, four dependent progression picklists, 12-month purchasing model, MAT-adjusted assumptions, dedicated custom object, current-record linking, history preservation, reporting and scheduled inactivity closure. Generic Flow, forecasting, pipeline-reporting and prioritisation pages are all facets of this system.
projects.featuredMetric: Used 12 months of purchasing data and automatically closed inactive opportunities after 21 days.

projects.title: Salesforce Access Governance, Data Standards and User Adoption
projects.summary: Governed departmental access to Salesforce objects, fields and Flows while standardising core CRM data and supporting users through testing, training and troubleshooting.
projects.details: Combine permission sets, object and field security, validation, Lead/Contact/Account standards, user acceptance testing, documentation, training, coaching and adoption support. Keep the scope accurate as departmental super-user and configuration ownership rather than unrestricted organisation-wide platform ownership.
projects.featuredMetric: Created a controlled departmental model for access, data quality and adoption.

projects.title: Commercial Systems Operating Model and Change Leadership
projects.summary: Aligned sales, marketing, CRM and operational teams around clearer ownership, repeatable workflows, governance and shared commercial information.
projects.details: This should be the single people-and-process case study. Focus on requirements gathering, workflow redesign, roles and responsibilities, quality controls, cross-functional decision-making, executive communication, implementation planning and sustained adoption. Do not repeat the detailed technical builds covered by the other pages.
projects.featuredMetric: Established shared operating practices across sales, marketing, CRM and operations.

projects.title: Mailchimp-to-MCAE Migration, Data Remediation and Platform Rebuild
projects.summary: Led the transition from a high-risk Mailchimp and Pro-Net environment into a governed MCAE instance built largely from scratch.
projects.details: Combine migration, legacy-data rationalisation, platform rebuild, database cleaning, send-hygiene recovery and legacy-systems transformation. Keep consent and suppression policy creation in the migration narrative, while the detailed ongoing audience logic belongs on the self-healing architecture page.
projects.featuredMetric: Reduced approximately 30,000 legacy contacts to 19,000 viable prospects and improved successful-send rate to approximately 99%.

projects.title: Self-Healing MCAE Audience, Consent and Buyer-Qualification Architecture
projects.summary: Designed a self-healing audience and qualification system covering suppression, preferences, remediation, segmentation, scoring, grading and long-cycle nurture.
projects.details: Use one page for the approximately 400-list architecture, dynamic versus static logic, Master Suppression List, unsubscribe and preference governance, missing-data remediation, three commercial audiences, behavioural scoring, profile grading, audience prioritisation, nurture journeys and campaign-quality controls.
projects.featuredMetric: Built approximately 400 MCAE lists within a governed, permission-aware audience architecture.

projects.title: MCAE Campaign Operations, Performance and Revenue Influence
projects.summary: Operated MCAE as a segmented campaign and performance channel across email, events, webinars and gated content, connecting activity with commercial influence.
projects.details: Combine campaign management, KPI design and multi-channel acquisition into one operating case study. Keep campaign execution and performance here; keep the underlying data architecture on the migration and audience pages, and detailed attribution mechanics on the attribution page.
projects.featuredMetric: Managed 50+ campaigns, increased average open rate from approximately 8% to 40%, achieved an 84% best campaign open rate and influenced approximately £419,475 in revenue.

projects.title: Webinar and Event Registration, CRM and Follow-Up Automation
projects.summary: Connected event and webinar promotion, registration, attendance and follow-up with Salesforce Campaigns and MCAE audience journeys.
projects.details: Use one implementation page for registration capture, Campaign Member handling, attendance data, segmented follow-up, CRM visibility and event-influence reporting. Hybrid delivery and event-registration improvement are stages of the same workflow.
projects.featuredMetric: Supported email activity for 8 events and 2 webinars, including invites, promotion and live Zoom operation or hosting.

projects.title: Modular MCAE XHTML Email Template System
projects.summary: Designed and delivered MCAE's standard modular email-production framework after the Mailchimp migration removed the previous drag-and-drop content-block workflow.
projects.details: Add this as a new project from the career database. Cover revenue-led analysis of successful Mailchimp layouts, module and brand design, AI-assisted XHTML generation, manual review, cross-client testing, security-conscious structures, documentation, training and incremental expansion. Do not imply unaided authorship of complex XHTML.
projects.featuredMetric: Created approximately 13 reusable modules across 13 templates, supporting up to 48 combinations and reducing typical production from several days to approximately one day.

projects.title: AI-Ready Salesforce, Pardot and Website-Automation Architecture
projects.summary: Built governed Salesforce and Pardot/MCAE data, Campaign, segmentation and website-handoff foundations designed to support future AI-assisted workflows.
projects.details: Merge the two AI-readiness pages. Cover agent-operable Lead and Contact structures, Campaign connections, journey eligibility, Zapier website-to-Pardot handoffs and the planned attribution enhancement. State clearly that no production AI model, agent or AI-driven attribution layer was deployed after token funding was withdrawn.
projects.featuredMetric: Completed the AI-ready data and automation foundations; the AI execution layer was not deployed.

projects.title: Local-Authority Commercial Intelligence Application
projects.summary: Built a custom commercial-intelligence application that brought local-authority, Account and Bid information into a more usable decision-support view.
projects.details: Add this as a new project from the career database rather than hiding it inside the account-hierarchy page. Position it as the application and decision-support layer built on top of the local-authority data model. Describe AI assistance accurately through requirements definition, prompting, testing, validation, configuration and end-to-end ownership rather than claiming unaided software development.
projects.featuredMetric: Covered approximately 200 local authorities, 1,000+ Accounts and around 2,500 annual Bids.

projects.title: AI-Assisted Newsletter Engagement and Privacy-Conscious Leaderboard
projects.summary: Designed, built, tested and deployed a web application concept that turned newsletter engagement into a visible, privacy-conscious participation experience.
projects.details: All six independent AI pages describe the same product and development workflow. Use one case study for the engagement concept, stakeholder-facing interface, privacy-by-design choices, leaderboard logic, structured prompting, iterative testing, GitHub version control and Vercel deployment.
projects.featuredMetric: Built and published a functioning web application; the public newsletter launch was delayed.

projects.title: Youth Programme Revitalisation, Audience Growth and Cost Control
projects.summary: Revitalised youth events and community programmes through stronger programming, grassroots marketing, partnership development and operational control.
projects.details: Combine portfolio growth, event marketing, community engagement and attendance revitalisation into one evidence-led project. Use the database's attendance, client-growth and cost-control outcomes rather than separate generic pages.
projects.featuredMetric: Tripled average attendance, doubled the client base and reduced departmental spending by 30% while maintaining delivery quality.

projects.title: Large-Scale International Conference Operations and Volunteer Leadership
projects.summary: Supported the planning and live delivery of large, multi-day international conferences across registration, access, volunteers, participant services, VIP operations and risk controls.
projects.details: Merge conference operations, volunteer management, logistics and risk into one page. These were interconnected workstreams within the same large-event environment rather than four distinct projects.
projects.featuredMetric: Supported major conferences attended by more than 30,000 people.
